name: Garlic Veggie Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sour cream and mayonnaise.
2. Add the minced garlic, chopped onion, and parsley to the bowl with the sour cream and mayonnaise.
3. Mix all ingredients together until well combined.
4. Stir in the chopped water chestnuts.
5. Cover the bowl tightly with plastic wrap.
6. Chill the mixture in the refrigerator for at least 2 hours, or overnight for best flavor.
7. Once chilled, serve the dip with fresh crisp vegetables.
Makes 2 1/2 cups.
